description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, open floor plan and multiple interconnected rooms. The structure features a mix of large and small windows, some grouped and others isolated, providing ample natural light throughout. The exterior is predominantly white with touches of gray and brown, and the property includes a spacious backyard area with a swimming pool, patio, and outdoor seating. A garage is attached to one side, and there is a driveway leading up to it. The roof is mostly flat, with some slight elevation changes and overhangs, and the layout includes a visible porch area at the front. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The exterior is mainly white with gray and brown accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended layout, garage, and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and additional rooms along the side of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and isolated windows, bay window on front facade
